'''鈭歾h-p-t-b''' ('''kazhapteboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:allure|allure]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==

|-

| zh-p-t-b

| [[Transitive verb]]

| [[Wikt:allure|allure]] (auto-generated)

|-
